case_title: KAZEM TORSHIZI VS. MARK BABOR HORTON

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TORSHIZI, KAZEM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HORTON, MARK BABOR $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,365.00, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $800, AN AMOUNT WHICH PLAINTIFF HAS ALREADY RECEIVED FROM DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, PER FILED ACKNOWLEDGMENT, THE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN FULLY PAID OR SATISFIED AS TO THESE JUDGMENT DEBTORS ONLY: MARK BABOR HORTON. AS TO DEFENDANT HORTON, MARK BABOR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TORSHIZI, KAZEM AS TO DEFENDANT HORTON, MARK BABOR

SC-108 REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-08-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
